page_metadata.biotools__summary: Java program that constructs customized transcript databases for tandem mass spectra search. RNA-Seq data is used to generate transcripts and to resolve shared peptide protein inference in a proteogenomic network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Java program that constructs customized transcript databases for tandem mass spectra search. RNA-Seq data is used to generate transcripts and to resolve shared peptide protein inference in a proteogenomic network.
